title: Show Your Work!: 10 Ways to Share Your Creativity and Get Discovered
subtitle: 10 Ways to Share Your Creativity and Get Discovered
author: Austin Kleon
themes: Sharing the process, not just the finished work
The importance of documenting what you do
Building an audience before you need it
The amateur as the heart of creativity
The think quadrant: where creativity lives
Curation as a legitimate creative act
The gifts of the void: what to leave empty
excerpt: A witty, illustrated guide to sharing your creative process with the world — Austin Kleon's bestselling manifesto that teaches artists, makers, and professionals that the secret to getting discovered is to show your work.
